caption: A woman with shoulder-length dark hair and glasses stands against a solid dark grey background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved tunic with a decorative dark embroidered collar and small red floral patterns throughout. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her neckline, and she wears a simple dark necklace. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking and gesturing with her hands. In the beginning, her hands are held low and open, and she looks directly forward. As the scene progresses, she continues talking, shifting her facial expressions and slightly closing her eyes in the final moment while bringing her hands upward and closer together in a gesturing motion. In the bottom left corner of each frame, a small gold circular logo is visible next to the text "NPTEL".
